title: Bounded AI delegated post-control guidance refresh execution
objective: Execute the next delegated dual-lane packet after Packet 838 publication by reusing the unchanged authoritative-host helper surface for a fresh admitted-trio live evidence tuple while aligning the orchestration status brief, the parallel-readiness checklist, and the workflow-first runbook to the published delegated Packet 831 through Packet 838 governance stack and current next-step posture under explicit coordinator ownership.
execution_gate: Ready after Packet 838 publication and authoritative-host parity restoration on 2026-05-14.
publication_note: Lane A and Lane B validated cleanly, the Packet 839 closeout set was published, and authoritative-host parity was restored at the same clean head using only the bounded generated-artifact blocker remediation authorized by the delegated checklist.
constraints: Keep Lane A limited to the admitted apex-fs, apex-db, and apex-jobs trio plus the repo-visible Packet 839 artifact tuple.
Keep Lane B limited to the orchestration status brief, the parallel-readiness checklist, and the workflow-first runbook.
Do not widen controller scope, service admission, auth, ingress, runtime posture, or business logic.
context: Packet 830 remains the helper-bootstrap-toolchains-python3-path floor, Packet 831 remains the delegated split-governance floor, Packet 832 remains the delegated operator prompt template floor, Packet 833 remains the delegated coordinator closeout template floor, Packet 834 remains the delegated packet-definition template floor, Packet 835 remains the higher-level orchestration entry-surface alignment floor, Packet 836 remains the active plan and authority control-surface alignment floor, Packet 837 remains the live guidance-refresh floor, and Packet 838 remains the post-guidance control-surface refresh floor.

The current recommendation in PROJECT_STATUS.md is another delegated packet reusing the Packet 831 through Packet 834 stack with a new disjoint lane objective while preserving the Packet 835, Packet 836, Packet 837, and Packet 838 aligned surfaces.

The higher-level guidance trio still stops below the new Packet 838 control-surface floor in its current proof-floor and follow-on wording, so this packet refreshes those remaining guidance surfaces without reopening helper or controller scope.

lanes.name: authoritative-host evidence lane
scope: run the focused helper truthfulness pytest slice
publish only the Packet 839 artifact tuple emitted by the unchanged helper

lanes.name: post-control guidance refresh lane
scope: align the orchestration status brief to the published delegated Packet 831 through Packet 838 governance stack and current next-step posture
align the parallel-readiness checklist so its proof floor and delegated template guidance preserve Packet 837 and Packet 838 explicitly
align the workflow-first runbook so its current delegated execution posture and current follow-on wording preserve Packet 837 and Packet 838 explicitly
validation: Required-anchor scan for Current Delegated Proof Floor, Packet 838, Packet 837, Packet 836, Packet 835, Immediate Next Steps, Current Recommendation, Current proof floor for this cadence, Current Delegated Template Stack, Checklist I - First Two-Lane Rehearsal Evidence Pattern, Current Delegated Execution Posture, and Current Follow-On

expected_outcome: One fresh Packet 839 admitted-trio live evidence tuple emitted through tools/ai/run_authoritative_host_packet.py under tests/canary/host-bootstrap-status/actual and tests/canary/mcp-contract/actual

The orchestration status brief, the parallel-readiness checklist, and the workflow-first runbook all preserve the Packet 838-aligned control-surface posture and the Packet 837-aligned live guidance posture truthfully
One coordinator-owned closeout handoff for Packet 839 plus shared status-surface updates only after both lane validations and host parity restoration succeed
abort_rule: If either lane needs a file outside its declared set, if the helper requires mutation, if the focused pytest slice fails, if the live helper result is not PASS, or if the guidance refresh cannot be validated through the declared anchors, stop both lanes and close the packet as ABORTED.
